title: Eval task definition
description: One self-contained task. Lives at tasks/<category>/<id>/task.yaml (or .json).

version.description: Semver of the task definition. Bump when the prompt or grader changes in a way that invalidates prior runs.

instruction.description: The natural-language task description shown to the system.

system_prompt_addendum.description: Optional extra system-level guidance (e.g. 'do not exceed 40 lines'). Adapters that don't support system prompts MUST prepend this to the instruction.

type.description: How the starting repo state is provided.

path.description: Relative path to the fixture directory (when type=dir) or tarball.

sha.description: Commit SHA to check out (when type=git). Required for reproducibility.

script.description: Path to grader.py (when type=programmatic). Receives (workdir, result_json) and writes a score JSON.

rubric.description: Path to rubric.md (when type=llm_judge or human).

judge_models.description: Cross-family judge model IDs (when type=llm_judge). E.g. ['gpt-4o', 'gemini-1.5-pro'].

required_capabilities.description: Adapters MUST refuse a task whose capabilities they can't satisfy. Prevents misleading 'system X failed' when system X simply can't write files.

allowed_paths.description: Glob patterns. Edits outside these are grader-failed. Prevents over-aggressive refactors.

forbidden_paths.description: Glob patterns the system must NOT touch. E.g. the sealed test file.

notes.description: Why this task exists, what it's designed to surface.
